seoTitle: IXYS News & Updates | Power Semiconductor Technology | LiTong
seoDescription: Latest news and updates from IXYS including new product releases, technology breakthroughs, and industry insights. Stay informed about power semiconductor innovations.

news.title: IXYS Integration with Littelfuse Creates Power Semiconductor Leader
news.summary: The integration of IXYS into Littelfuse has created a comprehensive power semiconductor portfolio, combining IXYS's expertise in high-voltage devices with Littelfuse's circuit protection technologies.
content: The complete integration of IXYS Corporation into Littelfuse has created a powerhouse in power semiconductors and circuit protection. This strategic combination brings together IXYS's 30+ years of expertise in high-voltage power MOSFETs, IGBTs, and RF power devices with Littelfuse's leadership in circuit protection technologies.
- **Power Semiconductors**: IXYS's high-voltage MOSFETs, IGBTs, diodes, and thyristors
- **Circuit Protection**: Littelfuse's fuses, TVS diodes, and surge protection devices
- **Power Modules**: Integrated solutions combining switching and protection
- **RF Power**: High-frequency power devices for telecommunications
- Broader product portfolio for complete system solutions
- Enhanced technical support and application expertise
- Global supply chain and manufacturing capabilities
- Continued commitment to quality and innovation
LiTong, as an authorized distributor, provides access to the full combined product portfolio with comprehensive technical support.

news.title: IXYS Launches New 900V Super Junction MOSFET Series
news.summary: New 900V super junction MOSFETs deliver industry-leading on-resistance and switching performance for high-voltage power supplies and motor drives.
content: IXYS has announced the launch of a new 900V super junction MOSFET series, delivering breakthrough performance for high-voltage power electronics applications. The new devices feature industry-leading on-resistance and fast switching characteristics.
- Solar inverters and energy storage systems
LiTong is ready to support customers with samples, design-in assistance, and volume supply.

news.title: IXYS Expands AEC-Q101 Qualified Product Portfolio
news.summary: Additional power MOSFETs and diodes achieve AEC-Q101 qualification, expanding IXYS's automotive product offerings for electric vehicles and advanced driver assistance systems.
content: IXYS has announced the expansion of its AEC-Q101 qualified product portfolio, with additional power MOSFETs and diodes now qualified for automotive applications. This expansion supports the growing demand for power semiconductors in electric vehicles and automotive electronics.
- **Automotive MOSFETs**: 40V to 600V devices for various automotive applications
- **Fast Recovery Diodes**: Optimized for automotive power supplies
- **Protection Devices**: TVS diodes and rectifiers for automotive systems
- Electric vehicle powertrains and charging systems
All qualified products undergo rigorous testing including high-temperature reverse bias, temperature cycling, and humidity testing.

news.title: IXYS Power Semiconductors Enable Next-Generation Renewable Energy Systems
news.summary: IXYS IGBT modules and high-voltage MOSFETs are being deployed in advanced solar inverters and wind turbine converters, supporting the global transition to renewable energy.
content: IXYS power semiconductors are playing a critical role in next-generation renewable energy systems, from residential solar inverters to utility-scale wind turbine converters. The company's high-voltage MOSFETs and IGBT modules deliver the efficiency and reliability required for these demanding applications.
- High-voltage MOSFETs for auxiliary power supplies
The robust design and long-term reliability of IXYS devices make them ideal for renewable energy applications requiring 20+ year service life.

news.title: IXYS Power Semiconductors Power Advanced Medical Equipment
news.summary: IXYS high-voltage power devices are enabling next-generation medical imaging equipment and therapeutic devices with high reliability and precise power control.
content: IXYS power semiconductors are powering advanced medical equipment worldwide, from MRI machines to surgical equipment. The company's high-voltage MOSFETs and IGBTs deliver the reliability and performance required for critical medical applications.
IXYS devices meet the stringent reliability and quality requirements of the medical industry, with many products qualified to medical-grade standards.

news.title: IXYS Strengthens Industrial Automation Portfolio with New IGBT Modules
news.summary: New IGBT module series targets industrial motor drives and servo systems with enhanced thermal performance and integrated protection features.
content: IXYS has expanded its industrial automation portfolio with the introduction of new IGBT modules designed specifically for motor drives and servo control applications. The new modules feature enhanced thermal performance and integrated protection features.
- **Thermal Design**: Enhanced DBC substrate for better heat spreading
- Isolated base plate for easy mounting
These modules are ideal for variable frequency drives, servo systems, and industrial power supplies.
